title: Error: Label with invalid name detected, which cannot be renamed because it is associated with a field
breadcrumbs: Error: Label with invalid name detected, which cannot be renamed because it is associated with a field
text: Error: Label with invalid name detected, which cannot be renamed because it is associated with a field This message is generated when the Migration Utility detects an attached label that must be renamed. Problem When one or more characters of the label name are not acceptable, the Migration Utility attempts to rename the label. However, this is not possible when the label is attached to a field (it shares the name of the field, resulting in special behavior). The Migration Utility cannot resolve this, so it generates a fatal error and removes the component from the Repository. Resolution To resolve this issue, you must correct the component in Uniface 9 before migrating it again. Sample Message === MIGRATION ERROR [cpt:MYCOMPONENT] === Failed to migrate cpt:MYCOMPONENT. Object will be removed from the repository. ErrorID: -100006 Error : Label with invalid name detected, which cannot be renamed because it is associated with a field Context information: [context] [entity] = "MYENT.MYNAMESPACE" Removed cpt:MYCOMPONENT from repository Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
